case_title: TOLAMA, NOE C. VS ESCALON, CORINA

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO CORINA ESCALON RETURNED SIGNED.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALON, CORINA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY TOLAMA, NOE C. AS TO DEFENDANT ESCALON, CORINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOLAMA, NOE C. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCALON, CORINA $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $921.00, PLAINTIFF TO RETURN THE CAR TO DEFENDANT BY 10/18/97. DEFENDANT WAIVED IMPROPER VENUE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
